LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.NoPawn: You need to have a pawn in the colony to dye their clothing or hair. Use !buy pawn first.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.IdeologyRequired: Please specify a color. The favorite color system requires the Ideology DLC.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.InvalidColor: '{0}' is not a valid color. Try using RimWorld hair color names (like 'PitchBlack', 'DarkReddish', 'SandyBlonde'), common color names (like 'red', 'blue'), or hex codes like #FF0000.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.NoHair: Your pawn doesn't have hair to dye.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.NoDyeableClothing: No dyeable clothing found on your pawn.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.ApparelSuccess: Successfully dyed {0} piece(s) of clothing to {1}.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.HairSuccessDead: Successfully dyed the hair of your deceased colonist to {0}.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.ApparelSuccessDead: Successfully dyed {0} piece(s) of clothing on your deceased colonist to {1}.
LanguageData.RICS.DyeCommand.DeadPawnNote: {0}. Sorry for your loss — we've prepared them for the funeral.
